---
title: time-equal
description: "Prefer time.Time.Equal over equality."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🟡 `warning`

Prefer time.Time.Equal over equality. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
if first.Time == second.Time { match() }
```

## Good

```go
if first.Equal(second) { match() }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only time-equal`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
